name: Meilisearch
tagline: MeiliSearch is a powerful, fast, easy to use and deploy search engine.
description:
MeiliSearch is a powerful, fast, easy to use and deploy search engine.

Docs: https://www.meilisearch.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  meilisearch:
    image: getmeili/meilisearch:latest
    environment:
      - MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS=${MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS:-true}
      - MEILI_ENV=${MEILI_ENV:-production}
      - MEILI_MASTER_KEY=ebb4bf03e6fd8a55aba19930423eb37c
    volumes:
      - meilisearch-data:/meili_data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:7700/health
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42067:7700
volumes:
  meilisearch-data: null
